pages.title: Slot Map
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Seed$(): manual input for the crop.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Nutrition$(): N reservoir input.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Purified Water$(): P reservoir input.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Data Signal$(): D reservoir input.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Output$(): mature resource output.

pages.title: Resources & Growth
pages.text: $(li)Biochemical Solution: N +25, decays 1/second.$(br)$(li)Purified Water Bottle: P +20, decays 1/2 seconds.$(br)$(li)Silicon Shard: D +15, decays 1/3 seconds.$(br2)Growth normally requires N>10, P>10, and D>0. These are shared machine reservoirs and survive seed changes. Maturation costs another 5 N and 5 P.

pages.title: Speed & Outputs
pages.text: $(li)Fiber Reed Seed → Plant Fiber.$(br)$(li)Protein Soy Seed → Biochemical Solution.$(br)$(li)Alcohol Bloom Seed → Industrial Ethanol.$(br2)Count = 2 + floor(Yield÷3). Potency becomes the matching quality, while Generation, Synergy, and mutation data pass to the mature ingredient. Speed and current N/P/D determine actual cultivation time.

pages.title: Automation Faces
pages.text: $(li)Insert N, P, and D from the sides.$(br)$(li)Extract mature resources from below.$(br)$(li)Keep the seed slot manual.$(br)$(li)Each channel injects at most one item per second when its reservoir has room.$(br2)Purified water is consumed with its bottle; no empty bottle is returned. Full progress waits if the output slot is blocked.
